'''rathogo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pochade|pochade]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-th-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pochade|pochade]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| rathogo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ræthegeth|ræthegeth]] || [[word:ræthegej|ræthegej]] || [[word:ræthegesh|ræthegesh]] || [[word:ræthege|ræthege]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:rathothogoth|rathothogoth]] || [[word:rathothogoj|rathothogoj]] || [[word:rathothogosh|rathothogosh]] || [[word:rathothogo|rathothogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:rathogoth|rathogoth]] || [[word:rathogoj|rathogoj]] || [[word:rathogosh|rathogosh]] || [[word:rathogo|rathogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:rathofgoth|rathofgoth]] || [[word:rathofgoj|rathofgoj]] || [[word:rathofgosh|rathofgosh]] || [[word:rathofgof|rathofgof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:rathogotho|rathogotho]] || [[word:rathogojo|rathogojo]] || [[word:rathogosho|rathogosho]] || [[word:rathogoko|rathogoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:rathogoth|rathogoth]] || [[word:rathogoj|rathogoj]] || [[word:rathogosh|rathogosh]] || [[word:rathogo|rathogo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:rathogothol|rathogothol]] || [[word:rathogojol|rathogojol]] || [[word:rathogoshol|rathogoshol]] || [[word:rathogokol|rathogokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:rathogothotho|rathogothotho]] || [[word:rathogojojo|rathogojojo]] || [[word:rathogoshosho|rathogoshosho]] || [[word:rathogoko|rathogoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:rathogothon|rathogothon]] || [[word:rathogojon|rathogojon]] || [[word:rathogoshon|rathogoshon]] || [[word:rathogokon|rathogokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:rathogothoro|rathogothoro]] || [[word:rathogojoro|rathogojoro]] || [[word:rathogoshoro|rathogoshoro]] || [[word:rathogokoro|rathogokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
